Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal

Class ListVerifierNoOp<L extends List<E>,E>

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractObjectVerifierNoOp<ListVerifier<L,E>,L>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.ListVerifierNoOp<L,E>
Type Parameters:
L - the type of the list
E - the type of elements in the list
All Implemented Interfaces:
ExtensibleCollectionVerifier<ListVerifier<L,E>,L,E>, ExtensibleObjectVerifier<ListVerifier<L,E>,L>, ListVerifier<L,E>
public final class ListVerifierNoOp<L extends List<E>,E> extends AbstractObjectVerifierNoOp<ListVerifier<L,E>,L> implements ListVerifier<L,E>
A ListVerifier that does nothing.

    Method
    Description

    asArray(Class<E> type)

    Validates nested requirements.

    contains(Object element)
    Ensures that the actual value contains an element.

    Ensures that the actual value contains an element.

    Ensures that the actual value contains all of the specified elements.

    Ensures that the actual value contains all of the specified elements.

    Ensures that the actual value contains any of the specified elements.

    Ensures that the actual value contains the specified elements; nothing less, nothing more.

    Ensures that the actual value contains the specified elements; nothing less, nothing more.
